title: Ewoks and Droids Adventure Hour
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|reb|italics=1}} {{TelevisionSeries |image=[[File:EwoksDroidsAdvHour.jpg]] |title=''Ewoks and Droids
Adventure Hour'' |format= |num episodes= |num seasons= |runtime= |network=[[ABC Television Network|ABC]] |first aired=[[September 7]], [[1985]]{{ThisWeek|4_3IbhbVMsY|Build the LEGO Mos Eisley Cantina, Look Inside Marvel's Star Wars: The High Republic Comic, and More!|sw_url=video/build-the-lego-mos-eisley-cantina-look-inside-marvel-s-star-wars-the-high-republic-comic-and-more}} |last aired= |creators=[[George Lucas]] |writers=*[[Richard Beban]] *[[Ben Burtt]] *[[Bob Carrau]] *[[Paul Dini]] *[[Sharman DiVono]] *[[Joe Johnston]] *[[Gordon Kent]] *[[Michael Reaves]] *[[Peter Sauder]] *[[Steven Wright]] |directors=*[[Raymond Jafelice]] *[[Clive A. Smith]] *[[Ken Stephenson]] |executive producers=*[[Miki Herman]] *Elena Lesser *[[George Lucas]] *Cliff Ruby *[[Peter Sauder]] |production company= |starring=*[[George Buza]] *[[Alyson Court]] *[[Anthony Daniels]] *[[Don Francks]] *[[Jim Henshaw]] *[[Taborah Johnson]] *[[Cree Summer]] |music= |timeline=*[[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]],''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen, Revised]]'', p. 56 [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]{{InsiderCite|73|A State of Nelvana: Droids & Ewoks Adventure Hour Revisited|A State of Nelvana: ''Droids & Ewoks Adventure Hour'' Revisited}} *[[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=222689&start=1905#14621041|thread=Books, Comics, & Television VIPs|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-04-20|time=11:42 AM}} }} {{Quote|It was better animated than most of the stuff on the air at the time.|[[Paul Dini]], ''Ewoks'' and ''Droids'' writer|{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}}} The '''''Ewoks and Droids Adventure Hour''''' was an [[ABC Television Network|ABC]] television programming block that aired from [[1985]] to [[1986]]. It ran episodes of the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Droids'']] and [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated television series. In ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'', pressing Alt-V and then typing "ovres" will turn on theatre mode, where [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] watch the cutscenes and comment [[Wikipedia:Mystery Science Theater 3000|MST3K]]-style. At one point, they imitate [[Rookie One]], saying, "Let's see what's on the telly. It's the Ewoks/Droids cartoon hour! I loved that show! Especially that episode where R2 joined that cult.... and began talking like a hippie..." The code "ovres" is "servo" backwards, which is probably a reference to MST3K's character [[Wikipedia:Tom Servo|Tom Servo]]. {{Media-stub}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} *{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}} *{{InsiderCite|32|Caravan of Courage: Star Wars on Television|''Caravan of Courage'': ''Star Wars'' on Television}} *{{SW|url=news/droids-and-ewoks-return-spains-lost-star-wars-comic-strips|text=Droids and Ewoks Return: Spain's Lost ''Star Wars'' Comic Strips|int=Droids and Ewoks Return: Spain's Lost Star Wars Comic Strips|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DroidsEpisodes}} {{EwoksEpisodes}} {{Interlang |ka=ევოკების და დროიდების თავგადასავლების საათი |pt=Ewoks and Droids Adventure Hour }} [[Category:Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]] [[Category:Star Wars: Ewoks]]
